# devin_enterprise_knowledge_note (Resource)

Manages an enterprise-level Devin knowledge note, shared across all organizations in the enterprise. Use devin_knowledge_note for organization-scoped notes.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Enterprise-level notes are shared across every organization.
resource "devin_enterprise_knowledge_note" "security_policy" {
  name    = "Security Policy"
  body    = file("${path.module}/knowledge/security-policy.md")
  trigger = "When handling credentials or secrets"
}

# Notes can be pinned to a specific repository.
resource "devin_enterprise_knowledge_note" "release_process" {
  name        = "Release Process"
  body        = file("${path.module}/knowledge/release-process.md")
  trigger     = "When cutting a release"
  pinned_repo = "mycompany/platform"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `body` (String) Body content of the knowledge note (markdown).
- `name` (String) Name/title of the knowledge note.
- `trigger` (String) When this knowledge note is retrieved. Describes the trigger/scope condition.

### Optional

- `is_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the note is enabled. Defaults to true.
- `pinned_repo` (String) Repository this note is pinned to (e.g., 'myorg/myrepo').

### Read-Only

- `note_id` (String) Knowledge note ID (assigned by Devin).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Enterprise knowledge notes are imported with the note ID.
terraform import devin_enterprise_knowledge_note.security_policy note-e08c75f44cd04560b462f466017d2bb0
```
